title: Sweethearts
director: W.S. Van Dyke, Robert Z. Leonard
writer: Frédérique De Grésac, Harry B. Smith, Robert B. Smith
actors: Jeanette MacDonald, Nelson Eddy, Frank Morgan
plot: The team behind a successful Broadway production tries to stop the married stars from transitioning to Hollywood.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 5 wins & 2 nominations total
